references.passiveText: Someone in the settlement mentioned a person who went missing from a nearby community. They never found out what happened.
references.triggerTopicLabel: The missing person you heard about
references.triggerDialogue: {target_npc} told me about it over drinks. Someone from {location} vanished on the road {location_hint} months ago. No trace, no word, no explanation. Their family has been putting up notices at every crossroads, but nobody has come forward. The road out that way has gotten more dangerous with {enemy_type} activity. Might be worth looking into if your travels take you that direction.
